history.content:
Can you update the goal for the news team - the one wth 6 agents not the new one with a single agent - We are shifting the focus of how the news channel is built - the site is already build in the team workspace - this is going to be held on GH and deployed on vercel with a vercel.app domain - Supabase DB still stands

ensure the repo is the right one when adjusting the team goal 

https://github.com/XposeMarket/Xpose-news-channel
